title: Curly Top
writer: Patterson McNutt, Arthur J. Beckhard, William M. Conselman
actors: Shirley Temple, John Boles, Rochelle Hudson
plot: Wealthy Edward Morgan becomes charmed with a curly-haired orphan and her pretty older sister Mary and arranges to adopt both under the alias of "Mr. Jones." As he spends more time with them, he soon finds himself falling in love w...
